::: top-banner
:::

# Workshop logistics

This section is reserved for venue details, travel instructions, local transportation, contact information, and online participation guidance.

## Location

Santa Cruz Island, Galápagos

## Dates

June 8 to June 12, 2026

## Venue

The workshop will be hosted on **Santa Cruz Island, Galápagos**.

The main working space and venue details are still being finalized. Additional venue instructions and access details will be shared closer to the workshop date.

## Travel note

Participants may need to stay overnight on mainland Ecuador on **June 7, 2026** before flying to **Galápagos** on **June 8, 2026**, depending on their travel itinerary.

Additional travel instructions, hotel details, and local transportation information will be shared by email.
